title: phyllanthus tenuicaulis subsp. haitiensis
intro: Phyllanthus tenuicaulis subsp. haitiensis is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae, native to Haiti and known for its medicinal properties. This plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing fever, treating liver and kidney diseases, and aiding in the management of diabetes. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction, made by boiling the roots and leaves in water, or as a tincture, where the plant material is steeped in a solvent such as ethanol. The herbal preparations of Phyllanthus tenuicaulis subsp. haitiensis have been used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, and further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal plant.
